title: Power HUD
description: A simple mod that powers up the player's HUD (Clock, Compass, Coordinates, etc.)
body:
# Minecraft Power HUD

A simple mod (open source) that powers up the player's HUD (Clock, Compass, Coordinates, etc.)

### Some of the features are:
- Real time clock in HUD
- Roll compass in HUD

![simple-image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vmarinho22/minecraft-power-hud/main/readme/images/clock-and-compass-hud.png)


## Requirements
- Java 17+
- Fabric Launcher
- Fabric API

## Installation

1. Download and install fabric launcher from the [official website](https://fabricmc.net/).

2. Download the mod from the [releases page](https://github.com/vmarinho22/minecraft-power-hud/releases).

3. Put the downloaded file in the mods folder of your minecraft installation (`.minecraft/mods`).

4. Start the game fabric api and enjoy!


## In game example

![full-game-xp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vmarinho22/minecraft-power-hud/main/readme/images/in-game-example.png)
